name: bartender
description: 调酒库 - 个人调酒管理工具

scripts.sync:android: npx cap sync android && node scripts/fix-android-java-version.js
scripts.build:android: node scripts/fix-android-java-version.js && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: node scripts/fix-android-java-version.js && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
